_note: One config per source. enabled=false to mute a source. Reddit thresholds are per-sub (raw upvotes OR upvotes/hour). HN/GitHub/Are.na carry their own signal at catch time. Tune during the first live runs.

filters._note: Cross-cutting gates from CURATION.md. maxAgeDays = hard recency ceiling (~6mo); target is fresher.

reddit._note: Skipped automatically until REDDIT_CLIENT_ID/SECRET are set (API approval pending).

hackernews._note: Deliberately omits bare 'ai/gpt/llm/agent' — those match political/news stories. Concrete creative-tool terms only; the Sonnet taste gate is the real filter.

arena._note: Human curation IS the signal. Swap these for channels Will actually follows.

hfpapers._note: Papers lane (primary). HF daily papers ranked by community upvotes — the notability signal raw arXiv lacks. Tune minUpvotes for the 'worth-knowing' bar.

arxiv._note: Papers lane (backup, muted). Raw arXiv keyword search floods incremental papers with no notability signal — HF Papers is primary. Re-enable only if a topic isn't covered there.

huggingface._note: Models lane. Two passes per pipeline (top-liked + newest), so fresh drops aren't lost behind all-time hits. minLikes keeps the fresh pass honest.
